_comment: TRAPPIST-1 with two hypothetical moons. Demonstrates the star–planets–moons full hierarchy check.

bodies.name: TRAPPIST-1 e moon (safe)
bodies._design_note: ≈0.23 R_Hill of TRAPPIST-1 e → expected stable (Domingos+2006 limit is ~0.5)
